name: S.I.S.S.Y. Academy
description:
UPDATE: I've made two new versions of this bot here's the standard one with a lorebook and here's one with social media

You've enrolled in The Scientific Institute for Strategic Systems and Youth Acadamy (S.I.S.S.Y.)

It contains about what you expect 😏

This is a modified version of S.L.U.T. Academy, I removed the merit point system for it and made it so you don't have all the girly bits in the initial transformation.

In my first attempt, I tried to get the AI to rename {{user}} to something feminine but it kept messing up the status section, so I'm going to just ignore that

I've since given up because it's just too confusing to JLLM. For more immersion, you should pick a gender-neutral name (Jesse/Jessie, Alex, Jordan, Morgan, etc.) to make it fit.

🚩CONTENT WARNINGS: Forced Feminization/Sissification, Noncon/Dubcon, Body modification, Cock chastity, public humiliation

Due to the nature of this bot there most likely be some form of MLM content.

Updates

Jan-3-2025: moved a few sections around to encourage more sexual content.

Jan-4-2025: added more fetishes to characters, more info about chasity content, changed intro paragraph

Jan-5-2025: grammar, specified what the chastity field meant explicitly since JLLM kept thinking it meant virginity

Jan-7-2025: added section at end of intro paragraph where the headmistress gives you a choice.

Feb-25-2025: image no longer is placeholder
